description: This pipeline applies advanced image filtering techniques. The main steps involve applying multiple filters to the images to enhance their quality.

71302615-6057-49d4-bcfa-fd44c9453a8d.name: ij1-contrast-histogram-enhancer
71302615-6057-49d4-bcfa-fd44c9453a8d.description: Implementation of the ImageJ contrast enhancer feature that uses histograms and normalization methods.

258427cd-eb9f-4623-a0eb-99b8b305c531.name: ij1-binary-connected-component-labeling-3d
258427cd-eb9f-4623-a0eb-99b8b305c531.description: Applies a connected components labeling on a mask. Each connected component is assigned a unique value in the output label image. If the image is non-binary, the connected components are generated per-input value. If 3D data is supplied, the connected components are extracted in 3D.

390bb4bb-426b-45b4-b292-13570b803d48.name: ij1-labels-to-rgb
390bb4bb-426b-45b4-b292-13570b803d48.description: Visualizes a labels image by assigning a color to each label component

87ea05bf-228b-4f25-b417-abb37d6d1a65.name: ij1-calibration-copy-physical-dimensions
87ea05bf-228b-4f25-b417-abb37d6d1a65.description:
Copies the phyiscal pixel sizes from the source to the target

This algorithm groups the incoming data based on the annotations. Those groups can consist of one data item per slot.

3dffa627-59d8-4e7f-b583-5882e3eec6c4.name: io-interface
3dffa627-59d8-4e7f-b583-5882e3eec6c4.description: Passes its input to its output without changes.

9a81ad36-1b1c-4d37-8dc8-b51956d644f8.name: ij1-roi-to-labels-name
9a81ad36-1b1c-4d37-8dc8-b51956d644f8.description:
Converts ROI and an optional reference image into a label image. The label value is provided by mapping the name to a value. If no name mapping is provided for a ROI, a unique label is generated. If no reference image is provided, the dimensions are estimated from the ROI. The background color (where no ROI is located) is zero.

This algorithm groups the incoming data based on the annotations. Those groups can consist of one data item per slot.

7c8318aa-c07b-4ef1-b809-d6dbe8a78d2e.name: ij1-color-blend-images
7c8318aa-c07b-4ef1-b809-d6dbe8a78d2e.description:
Overlays greyscale or RGB images.

This algorithm groups the incoming data based on the annotations. Those groups can consist of one data item per slot.
